title: OBE
text:
Al Marmoum Mosque
Located in Dubai- Al Ain Road at Al Marmoom area, with a plot area of 60,000 sq. ft., the Mosque has four main blocks. First is the main prayer hall and ladies prayer hall with surrounding arcade with an area of 12,500 sq. Ft. The second block is the ablution and service block which include WCs and ablution hall and electrical and plumbing rooms with an area of 1,300 sq.ft. The third one is the Imam block with a total area of around 4,000 sq.ft which include three residential units for Imam and other mosque staff. The fourth and last block is the shops which include four large shops with an area exceed 3,800 sq ft.
The total area of the project 22,000 sq. Ft with total 1,200 worshippers in the main hall and another 500 worshippers under the arcade, and another 500 worshippers for the ladies prayer room. Also, the project is provided with an internal parking lot for the Mosque worshippers and external parking lot behind the plot in case there are extra visitors. The Mosque has one Minaret and one Main Dome. The minaret design as modern away from the standard and classic design of classic minaret its square plan in shape transform into three smaller square rotated into 45 degrees in the last portion.

title: OBE
text:
Omar Bin Al Khattab Mosque
The Mosque is serving medium size neighborhood so the mosque capacity of 800 to 1,000 worshippers with the size of the praying hall 20mx20m leading directly from the cover arcade with no secondary hall. It includes women prayer hall with the capacity of 200 worshippers. Internally, the main prayer hall was omitted from internal columns to give more free space for the worshippers; woods inlaid the internal design in the ceiling, wall, and mihrab in Mashrabiya design. The ceiling design has the traditional decorative elements which reflect the architectural design of the façade. The Mosque also includes service block for ablution, WC, and Imam Block with a total area of the project around 8,000 sq. Ft.The location of the plot located in two streets with one axis to the plot which includes a parking lot for 30 car parks for the worshippers.

title: OBE
text:
Riggat Al Buteen Mosque
Located in the important plot in Baniyas Road interchange with the Dubai Chamber of Commerce and Industry. Plot area 20,090 sq. Ft which are considered small to compare the design requirements.
Several secondary domes and two minarets surround the main central dome of this religious gem in one of the most vibrant areas in old Dubai, the Baniyas area designed with the traditional Arabic and Islamic architecture in mind with white stone, and several arches on the front entrance of the mosque. The project layout follow the Islamic lines and the relation between the main prayer hall and service block close which give the feeling of the old Sikka in the city which links the worshippers from the ablution to the main prayer hall through narrow Sikka. The main hall covers 1,500 worshippers and can approach through three classic arches leads to high open veranda leading to the main hall.

title: OBE
text:
Union Mosque
Located in the central services area of Al Barsha second with a plot area of 81,632 sq, feet. The mosque is serving the central area buildings such as the Post Office, Union Cooperative, and Dubai Municipality Office. Also, it serves Al Barsha main neighborhood. The mosque capacity is close to 2,000 worshippers divided into two halls, primary and secondary. It also includes a library and classroom for Quran teaching. The women prayer hall can accommodate up to 300 persons who have its facility and entrance. The service Block is detached from the mosque with triangular shape adjust to the land corner.The local architecture inspires the Architectural Design of the Mosque. Historically, the mosque windows having the local decoration used in the old local houses. The Minrate emerge from the main mass of the mosque in square shape reduced into a small dome.

title: OBE
text:
Mosque At Sheikh zayed road Dubai
Located in Dubai Hatta Road at Nazwah area with a plot area of 110,000.00 sq.ft. The mosque includes main prayer hall with the capacity of 450 worshippers, secondary prayer hall with the capacity of 300 worshippers and the ladies prayer hall around 100 worshippers with a total built up area of 13,000.00 sq.ft. also this project includes imam block with a built up area of 3900.00 sq.ft , labor accommodation with an area of 330.00 sq.ft and the shop block with an area of 3100.00 sq.ft
This modern mosque has a triangular minaret and dome which covered with a parametric mashrabiya façade.
The project includes 70 car parking and 12 bicycle parking.

title: OBE
text:
Commercial Building at Sheikh Zayed Road
The building comprises of a basement, ground plus three stories. The use to be mixed commercial showrooms and offices with a total covered area …………………..
The design of the building reflects contemporary architectural style in modular forms, with massive use of reflective glass cut into rectangle and diagonal shapes.

title: OBE
text:
Community Retail Center - Design Competition
Aswaaq community retail center is a design competition for Aswaaq supermarket to build in several areas of Dubai.
The total built-up area of the project is 61,869.00 sq.ft with a Leasable area of 40,000 sq.ft.It has five selected plots such as Muhaisnah, Al Warqa, Nad al Shiba, etc.
The projects consist of 13 shops and 3 F&B in the ground floor with services, supermarket, food court and ten shops & kiosks in the first floor.

title: OBE
text:
Hor al anz building
With a basement as the car park plus 4 residential floors and a Gym, this building was designed with simple lines and homogeneous colors, The handrail is linking the masses of the building, and aluminum cladding to give a simplistic yet modern look for the elevation.

title: OBE
text:
Multi Use Project G+20
A two towers structure with multiple bridges connecting them on different levels, built on a podium that serves as 1st and mezzanine floors for offices and shops, and 20 floors in the towers for hotel rooms and suites.
A total built-up area of 462,300 sqft., designed mainly with glass and aluminum in very modern detailed design, with a high garden above the podium and plenty of room for water fountains and light designs that highlight the structure.
Located in Garhood area near Dubai Festival City, the design proposal based on creating two towers with a height of podium and 20 typical floors. One tower design for Hotel Room, and the other one as Residential Apartment. Both buildings connected with three futuristic bridges in a different level and different angle which gives more connectivity for the towers. In the roof of the podium and between the two towers create entertainment such as pools, gym, kids play area and outdoor terrace and cafeteria.
The Hotel Tower is designed with straight and simple lines and located to view the creek side, whereas the Residential Tower designed with slightly curved to have more exposure to the view.

title: OBE
text:
Residential Building G+6 Al Warqa-2
Located in Al Warqa in plot area 15,000 sq. Ft. surrounded with roads from 3 sides, ground floor accommodates with main reception and main building car park 37 number, the typical six floors are for residential apartments.
The strong up-right vertical glass masses was interrupted horizontally by clear and smooth pergola strips, and light handrails are the things that stand out in this project at first look. The richness in this structure comes from the clear white concrete parts mixed with curtains of tinted blue glass, all flow horizontally and bend around in a very random shape that offers a very open view from any and every part of the building for the tenants of this 1 & 2 bedrooms residential building.
The building located in Alwarqa First with a total built-up area of 46573.00 Sq.ft. The building includes 12 two BHK, 24 one BHK and 6 Studio flats. Total parking provided is 37 numbers. Elevation design in very smooth lines horizontally simply and minimal. The glass window is dominant in the Façade which is structured horizontally from end to end of the building.The balcony was designed merely to be projected with white color tie up the building from all around.

title: OBE
text:
Residential Building G+6 Al Warqa
Total plot area is 16,500 ft. located in Al Warqa-II, the plot is located in one of the main streets in Al Warqa-II, which is a commercial street.
The project includes ground and six typical floors. The ground floor is having the main entrance of the building and three shops located on the main street and residence car park. In the above typical, six floors include 48 apartments; 24 as 2 BR, and 24 as 3 BR and roof floor dedicated for gymnasium together with an outdoor pool.
The Elevation Design shows a lot of framing around the window. The frames are of different sizes and colors, and in some areas are tilted and projected. The glass window uneven cover the elevation which gives randomness to the Architectural design of the project.
Total built up area: 62,300 ft is the total area of the project including main building and balconies which is considered as main elements and feature to the building.
Internal plan of the apartments design in simple and clear spaces. Also, the plan provided with three sky court provides the maximum area of the apartment with natural light. The outer line of the plan is irregular to use the maximum of the view and external lights.

title: OBE
text:
Residential Building In International City
The proposed residential building located in an international city with a total area of 186,316.00 sq. Ft, The design of this residential building, encourages the use of the open terrace spaces by providing visual interest and eremitic amelioration. The building design is an L shape plan with a central core of service and elevators.
The height of the building B+G+8, ground floor, and basement accommodate the resident’s car park 149 number.A total number of apartments 135, 62 studio apartments, 67 one bedroom apartments and six apartments as two bedrooms. The roof of the ground floor design for entertainment for the residents includes a gymnasium, pool and kids’ pool together with sunbathing area.
The elevation has full exposure for the apartments to outside, through wide Balcony. Balconies cover all elevations of the building which became the main feature of the Façade. Also, the plan design in L shape with the tilted curved L and connected in a slim recess part which gives more elegance to the form.

title: OBE
text:
Business Center At Al Quoz
Located on the Sheikh Zayed road in Dubai, this complex has more than 50,000 sq. Ft. of the commercial area, and over 46,000 sq.ft of office space. The building has ground floor, a mezzanine floor, a first floor and underground covered parking.
The building is a mix of offices and showrooms that were designed to surround a centrally air-conditioned court, that is covered with a glass ceiling to allow the natural daylight into the whole space, It is also beneficial to serve as a gathering coffee and tea shop area.
The court size is 25mx25m having the full height of the building with surrounded corridors looking into the void, all the offices looking into the court with clear glass which allows the natural light from the skylight.
The court is sometimes used as a display area for the showrooms on the ground floor, also as a break time gathering area for the office. The building is located in two roads which used in a design by creating angle approach on the L, street junction, by creating cubicle
mass, cover with spider glass system, also used as the main entrance to the showrooms.

title: OBE
text:
Al Wasl Complex
Located in Madinat Dubai Al Malaheya, in plot area 39,875 sq. Ft, its ground floor is used for commercial and parking plus six typical floors as Residential apartments with a total built-up area 251,620.95, it is located on a cluster as part of entire buildings for new developments in Madinat Dubai Al Malaheya.
Design of the elevation is one of the standard design of elevations which is used widely by the developer “Wasl.” The elevation uses glass as cladding to the main façade and use aluminum feature painted with wooden texture. The plan of the project made as “H” shape having the service core in the center looking into the corridor with “H” shape too. In every floor includes 18 apartments mixed between 2 BR and 3 BR apartments with total 108 apartments in the whole building and every flat design to include all the required amenities as well as the building to be a luxurious project.

title: OBE
text:
Headquarters for Corporate Firm
40,000 sq.ft. plot located in Sheikh Zayed surrounded from 3 sides with roads. The Design includes basement use of car parking 75 cars, ground floor as commercial and reception, three typical floors for offices as open spaces. The total built-up area is 82,000 sq.ft. divided into four blocks and one common basement.
A group of buildings designed of curved lines without any edges, The purpose of
the buildings is to be used for offices total area of the building is 82822.0 sq.ft located in Sheikh Zayed Road. The design consists of four blocks to create a central courtyard. The theme is mainly a combination of aluminum and curved glass with balconies. It is an absolute 360-degree view. A 36,000 sq.Ft area con-
tains 74 parking in the basement; The ground floor is basically for offices, a cour-
tyard with the pedestrian area and a lush landscape serves as an outdoor garden.
The project area is divided into four blocks located in the edge of the plot which creates a central green plaza use as a gathering area for the offices and commercial
units.
The four-building has four different shapes of the floor plan. All of them have the curvy, rounded edge with full glass cladding from outside with aluminum separation panel between each floor.

title: OBE
text: Projects L Shaped Villa client: Private location: Dubai status: Completed New Unique design with reflecting pool covered by a part of the villa's first floor, spectacular exterior and interior. The villa located in Dubai with a total built up area of 11,500 sq.ft

title: OBE
text:
Minimal Villa
Modern and alternative special design for the exterior and superb view from the living and sitting room, it includes spacious space for the first-floor living room. The total built-up area of the villa is 9,900 sq.ft

title: OBE
text: Projects The Court Villa client: Private location: Dubai status: Completed The pretty and charming design has a lot of open and green spaces that bring energy and life to the living area. The villa is located in Dubai with a built-up area of 9,000.00 sq.ft

title: OBE
text:
Designed As Blocks
New classy design from the exterior with attractive interior design includes backyard connect to the staircase and splendid terrace in the ground floor.
The villa designed as blocks, located in Dubai with a total built-up area of 7,000.00 sq.ft.

title: OBE
text:
Linear Villa
Stylish design with a modern touch, the curtain walls giving the beauty of the villa plus exterior swimming pool for the entertainment.
The villa includes 4 Bedrooms, Majlis and living room with the built-up area of 5,500 sq.ft.

title: OBE
text:
Luxurious Villa
Luxury modern design as artwork specialized by natural lighting added to the living room and special design for the exterior elevation that enrich the appearance.
The total built-up area of the villa is 12,000.00 sq.ft

title: OBE
text:
Al Barsha villa 2
This villa is located in al barsha 2 with a plot area of 1500 Sq.m, this villa is ground floor only , it includes 3 bedrooms, living rooms, dining room and kitchen
the design of the villa in a 2 strips shape overlaped on each other which creates triangular court inorder to allow the daylight for internal spaces.

title: OBE
text:
Rest House Alhebab
A private yet modern villa complex that includes two individual luxurious blocks with a total built up area of 12,250.00 sq.ft. The villa’s design reflects harmony and connects with the external environment through the clear glass elevation and the architectural elements of stone and wood, giving warmth and richness to the entire design.

title: OBE
text:
Rest House Villa
A private villa with a uniquely modern touch, exhibiting a combination of glass and stone work which enhances the look of the structure. The villa includes 3 bedrooms, a sitting area and a gym with a Total built up area of 8150.00 sq.ft

title: OBE
text:
Country Side Luxurious Villa Set On The Top Of Hill
Private modern villa complex that includes two individual luxurious blocks, reflection pool and service block, with the area of more than 15,000 sq.ft. The villa designs reflect Harmony and connect with the external environment, through the clear glass elevation and the architectural elements of stone and wood giving warmth and richness to the entire design.

title: OBE
text: Projects Villa at Ummsuqeim client: Private location: Dubai status: Completed A private villa with a uniquely modern touch with a combination of glass and stone work which enhances the look of the structure. Total built up area - 17,600.00 Sq.ft

title: OBE
text:
Al Barsha Villa
This private villa located in al barsha 2 with a plot area of 1500Sq.m The Villa include 3 bedrooms, master bedroom designed to be independant in the first floor with private swimming pool , the ground floor its designed as open space between the main living room ,dininng room and open kitchen .

title: OBE
text:
Al Shabhab Extension
A large extension of the existing stadium including a new grand stand. The project preliminary
design was completed before the project was cancelled after the merging of the
three clubs in Dubai.

title: OBE
text:
Shabhab Al Ahli Stadium
The Proposed new football stadium design for New al Shabab club is located in
Dubai with a total built up area of 10,000 sq.m. The total seating capacity of the
Stadium is 20,000 spectators.

title: OBE
text:
Humaid Al Tayer Stadium
The stadium was used for training purposes. Recently the stadium was considered to
be proposed for the PLC to host local tournaments of UAE professional league of football.
The scope of work included new grand stand building and spectators stand. The
proposed design included changing rooms, gym, referee rooms, VIP lounge and others.

title: OBE
text:
Al Nasr Club Stadium For Asian Cup 2019
Al Nasr Club is one of the main football Clubs in UAE with phenomenal popularity and a large fan base within UAE, particularly in Dubai. The Club is located in the heart of Bur Dubai district. In 2016, UAE won the bid to host the 2019 Asian Cup, when Al Nasr Stadium was selected by the Local Organization Committee to be one of the main stadiums to host the AFC 2019 Tournament, based on the history of Al Nasr Club and its stadium.
OBE Architects has been appointed by the Client to carry out a full study of the existing stadium for compliance with the FIFA Regulations and the Asian Football Confederation. And propose the required changes to qualify the stadium, including the upgrade of the current stadium, as well as review the tournament requirements and propose solutions, and to propose a design for the after event stadium design. OBE Architects has appointed a spectrum of consultants and specialists including HOK, DPA, Movement Strategies, Space Agency and others.
Al Naser Club has been selected to be one of the hosting Dubai group for Asian Cup (2019), this selection demands significant change to be made to the Club & major refurbishments to its utilities which are almost 40 years old.

title: OBE
text:
DHA TB Lab
The proposed TB Lab and Isolation Wards G+3 Rashid hospital is designed to serve mainly the TB patient with all new and latest healthcare facilities. The building provides a convenient and comfortable atmosphere and natural light in all rooms and corridors also it will provide all daily requirements and services internally with support from Rashid hospital facilities.

title: OBE
text:
DHA Long Term Care Fac Health Project
The proposed Long-term care facility G+1 at Al Mamzar is designed to serve mainly the bedridden patient with all new and latest healthcare facilities. The building consists of 2 floors and a future plan for two more which contains.
The building provides a convenient and comfortable atmosphere and natural light in all rooms and corridors. The Architectural theme and external is entirely modern simple and dynamic with wide spaces of glass facade which provide enough amount of natural daylight in all wards, rooms, and corridors.There are three main wings; each one can accommodate 15 beds with central.Nursing facilities in the center of each wing. Total beds for this are 90 beds distributed in 6 wings in two floors.
Also, the project accommodates with Administration and supportive office. The total built-up area is 38,780 ft.

title: OBE
text:
Dubai Aviation Authority – Design Competition
The proposed designed is for Dubai civil aviation authority located in al Garhoud Dubai.
The building consists of G+M+3+Roof Floor with an exact area of total 89311.00 sq.ft.
Imitate an airplane lines using very smooth lines, creating building front edge to give the sense of aviation headquarter building. It is an office building located in Al Garhood area on two roads which help to create angle approach to the building. Internally, its open spaces design building with central service core, its ground plus mezzanine, plus three typical floors. The ground and mezzanine design as Main Reception, Administration, Coffee shop, and Multipurpose Hall. First and second floors are for the Departments of the Aviation Authority, and the third floor dedicated for the Board of Directors, CEO office, Ballroom, and Secretarial Office.Elevation has smooth lines and distortion surface which gives modern sense and aerospace feeling. The elevation material is a cladding hi-tech perforated aluminum cladding with a glass window. Also, the elevation was with the smooth white surface to imitate the plane surface and shape. All the office›s window expands with full glass window floor to ceiling which gives natural light to the internal space.

title: OBE
text:
Al Bayan & Emirates Today HQ
Located in Sheik Zayed Road near Dubai Canal, a major refurbishment has been made to an existing warehouse with the area around 50,000 sq. Ft. used for storage of goods, converted to new, modern and hi-tech head offices for Al Bayan and Emirates today.His honor Sheikh Mohammad bin Rashid ruler of Dubai and prime minister of UAE has been presented the inauguration of the project meeting with CEO and the decision makers in the corporate and the employee as well to get the feedback of new working offices.The requirement of each newspaper is to create two different entrance. Each entrance design in high modern design with open ceiling, expose services, and fair face concrete flooring. From the entrance, there is a steel staircase with chequer plate flooring heading to the Management office including CEO office, Chief Editorial, Secretarial, and Admin office. These offices overlook the main hall, and each hall includes open space for press editor offices and general small meeting rooms nine sq. Ft. serve the daily needs for editors. Also, there is a common area for general cafeteria and general washrooms.

title: OBE
text:
Dubai Journalists Association
The Journalists Association is a complete fully functional body of journalist administration offices with training rooms and halls, several boardrooms and all facilities to support the function of the association of journalism.
The building consists of a basement to accommodate 40 parking spaces, with a ground floor, plus four floors of the mixed and multi-functional professional complex, adding up to a total built-up area of more than 50,000 sq. Ft.The design concept inspired into wavy glass curtain. Imitate the symbol of the journalist’s sheet of paper, also the block of the multi-use hall inspired from the stack of the books lays horizontally, the visitors will get the feeling of entering a complex cares of publication.from service elevator with loading and unloading area, to centralized reception area, and several entrances and exits from various sides of the building.
The design was in two blocks and designed in two different way of Architectural lines, the first block is ground and first dedicated for the multi-purpose hall accommodating 500 seats. The Façade design was an inspiration of book stacks in an abstract way mixed with glass separate the blocks as floated on the water.

title: OBE
text:
Dubai Convention Center
Project located in a prime location in a plot with an area of 54,447.74 sq.m with a total built-up area of more than 1.7 million square feet. The project includes the main theater that can accommodate 10,000 seats. The link to the three towers by a concourse which is covered by a stunning glass roof linking the two project’s main elements together. Also, it includes walking promenade viewing the creek stretching and connecting the near projects around.
Dubai convention center is one of the essential central city’s projects for Expo 2020. The project located at Al-Jaddaf which developed as culture village district by the development of DPG. Convention center is located directly to the waterfront together with the central library and another new museum.
With the firm shape of the arena penetrating the water creek with the material of the titanium which will be a stunning landmark over the creek of Dubai.
The titanium material has the character to give the effect of the pearl twinkling over the sun movement. The design of the project was designed with three main strong forms.

title: OBE
text:
Fujairah Arts College - Design Competition
The site is located on Dibba Masafi Road Fujairah, adjacent to a hillside in an excellent strategic position
the concept is based on an urban village harmony with the natural surroundings and reflectin the rich culture of fujairah.
The scheme is envisioned to utilize the benefits of rectangular forms, and rectilinear grids to maintain transverse organization, hierarchical zoning and logical growth.
The proposed architectural style is conservative classic, with lot of inspirations from local architecture with modern touch of mashrabiya designs,skylights,glass enclosures..etc

title: OBE
text:
MBR School of Government – Design Competition
The school designed in abstract and influential form, since the school carry the name of HH sheikh Mohammed Bin Rashid Al-Maktom there are a lots of meanings associated with his personality. the design is a mix between the inspiration that comes from the school of government and the personality sheikh Mohammed, that design came as a result of these meaning by creating two strong contradicted forms, which create an (inspiring dialog ) and always enthusiastic to the minds.
This project consists 2 basement,+Ground+7 floor+conference hall & auditorium with 1000 & 350 seats respectively the total built up area of the project is 295,830.00 sq.ft.
Design development created two main points:
The entrance building which presents Sheikh Mohammed inspiration.
The conference hall was designed in a dynamic and free line to inspire the students with open-minded thinking. It was also created by seven straps joints or melt together, which represents the unity of the seven Emirates.
The total area of Mohammed Bin Rashid School of Government is 295,630 sq.ft. The project includes four primary elements, two basements for 457 car park, conference hall for 1500 seats, and the Auditorium hall for 350 seats.

title: OBE
text:
Training Center- Design Proposal
Its ground and first training center, located in Al Qusais area, the plot is located on three roads, and it is also adjacent to a parking lot used for the training center visitor.
The project designed in two main mass linked by entrance hall and utility zone. The first mass (block) is for the Administration and office of the center together with ten classrooms on two floors. This block is overlooking the green courtyard with the reflection of the pool. This courtyard can be used as an extension of the classes and coffee shop as outdoor seating, learning, and communication area. The second mass used as a multipurpose hall. This hall can be divided into four equal halls separated to automatic movable partition. The masses of the project design in different mass that gives roof terrace used as a roof garden for the classes on the first floor as an extension for the outdoor learning.
Also, it can be used as the main theatre with stage and backstage.The total area of 60,000 sq. Ft for the indoor spaces, also, there is an outdoor area for a car park for the center staff and disabled visitors of the center.
The design concept is from Contemporary Islamic Architecture.

title: OBE
text:
Private International English School
Design proposal in competition participation, it includes more than 82 classes distributed in all grades with the capacity of 2,267 students. The Architectural Design of the school was an inspiration of dynamic lights reflecting in the main elevation indicate modern design together with glass cladding written with inspirational words.
The proposed Al saad Indian school g+3 is located in Hor Al Anz with a total built-up area of 14,950 sq.m.The building designed as three individual blocks by connecting with a corridor with providing all requirements. Each classroom distributed very effectively with natural lights. This school consists auditoriums, libraries, Café and other school amenities such as football stadium, basketball court, tennis court, etc. and outside the building, there will be a huge sitting area provided which you can use for self-studying, etc. The proposed school design is a modern Architectural Design made by OBE Architects that is characterized by functionality and flat surfaces. Furthermore, all classrooms are oriented towards a green platform that will promote a pleasant learning environment.

title: OBE
text:
IMC College Academic City
The architecture style used for the college is the conservative classic architecture style, a lot of elements was grasped initially and imitate some of the famous architecture landmarks especially the holy mosque of the prophet in Medina, for the reason that Imam Malik was originally from Medina. It also was reflected in the plan pattern of the Islamic the privacy, connectivity, and flourish of the court were the main elements which used in the design.
A mixed religious, educational and cultural complex. The college named Imam Malik after the famous Islamic scholar who established one of four famous Islamic schools. It is the college of Law and Sharia and all associated knowledge. The college located in the academic city with a land area with a built-up area of 170,861 Sq.ft, the project include:
Administration, which includes all the teachers and management staff along with associated services.
Classroom, 25 classes for lecture these classes are used for male and female. Multi-purpose hall,
multi-use hall can accommodate more than 1000 seats which used in the graduation ceremony.

title: OBE
text:
Al Ahli Stadium AFC Cup 2019
The existing Rashid Stadium at Al Ahli club Dubai is refurbished and extended to host the AFC international football tournament in Jan. 2019.
The stadium successfully hosted Asian football games and accommodated more than 12,000 spectators with overlay seating proposal and all modern state of the art technologies as per FIFA standards.

title: OBE
text:
Quranic Park Dubai
Quran Park is a modern cultural project that will showcase the cultural and scientific achievements of Islam, including the collection of plants mentioned in the Quran and Sunnah. It will introduce visitors to the Islamic heritage in agriculture. The project is located in Al Khawaneej with a 15,000 square foot glasshouse and the cave of miracles which showcase the seven miracles mentioned in it using the latest technology. Also plenty of modern features, including solar trees, onsite Wi-Fi, phone charging stations and play area for kids.
The glass house is dedicated to displaying the plants mentioned in the Qur'an as a garden oasis.

title: OBE
text:
Modern Single storey villa
Simple and classy design in a modern look has a large area and wide windows, all interior rooms are designed as elegent style.
The villa is located in Dubai and the built-up area is 2,845.00 sq.ft

title: OBE
text:
Mosque At Dubai
Located in Dubai Saih Al shuhaib area with a plot area of 107,639 sq.ft. The project has four main blocks first one is the mosque with an area of around 12,680.00 sq.ft. The mosque includes main prayer hall with the capacity of 454 worshippers, secondary prayer hall with the capacity of 310 worshippers and the ladies prayer hall around 105 worshippers. The second one is imam block with a total built up area of around 3,907.00 sq.ft. The third one is labor accommodation with a built up area of 328.00 sq.ft. the fourth and last block is the shops which includes 3 large individual blocks placed separately as random in the site. Each shop blocks are with an area of 1033.00 sq.ft and the total area of three shops are 3100.00 sq.ft.
The elevation design idea has emerged from the Islamic mashrabiya pattern which placed as random and very attractive. The mosque has an equilateral triangular modern style minaret and very modern stylish dome with Islamic calligraphy placed on the surface.
Also the project includes 70 car parking and 12 bicycle parking.

title: OBE
text:
College at Academic city
The architecture style used for the college is the conservative classic architecture style
A mixed religious, educational and cultural complex. It is the college of Law and Sharia and all associated knowledge. The college located in the academic city with a land area with a built-up area of 170,861 Sq.ft, the project include:
Administration, which includes all the teachers and management staff along with associated services.
Classroom, 25 classes for lecture these classes are used for male and female. Multi-purpose hall,
multi-use hall can accommodate more than 1000 seats which used in the graduation ceremony.

title: OBE
text:
Dubai World Central
A design Competition submitted for designing residential complexes located on four plots in the Dubai world central in Jebal Ali. The two adjacent plot are designed as one connected complex with a podium and 2 separate masses, one of which takes the shape of a sail with clear glass cladding to add more transparency to the building. The total built up area of the project is over 400,000 sq.ft

title: OBE
text:
G+35 Residential Building
This building located in the Liwan area of Mizin, Dubai land.
The project consists of basement ground and 35 typical floors. The basement and part of the ground floor include the car parking for the residential flats which are located in the typical floors. each of the typical has both 2 BR and 1 BR flats.The architectural style of the building is simple and uses the glass mass , mixed with blue and white colors, as the aluminum louver in the southern elevation.

title: OBE
text:
FOOTBALL STADIUM
The design prepared to be a stunning and focal point for the city. New form and modern lines used with high tech and interactive facade. The design criteria of the stadium was prepared based on FIFA requirements to
host international games. Stadium capacity 30,000 spectators accommodate in two tires of stands
upper and lower, the location of the main home team & away team changes rooms shall be from east side with it's own entrance and the pitch access through central tunnel, whereas the premium
& media having own entrance from North and South side of the stadium.Main press conference shall be in the ground level and it can be access to the players facilities, also
gym and the medical facilities provided in the ground floor as per FIFA requirements. First floor
mainly shall be dedicate for administration offices, VIP & VVIP lounges and facilities shall be in the
second floor and third floor shall be for TV and radio commentators. Fourth floor shall be for retails/hospitality and the roof deck uses for main and secondary cameras.

title: OBE
text:
Our number one priority is providing our clients with a product that fits their budgeting needs and quality standards. Our select team of Engineers makes each project innovative and functional, and specializes in fast track building to get your project operational as quickly as possible.
Our mission is to transform spaces into living, breathing environments where people socialize and interact. In return, the reward for us is delivering an unforgettable experience for our clients, as well as theirs. Through communication, we cultivate a relationship of understanding that helps us to meet our clients’ goals. We work closely with trusted contractors to bring quality and timely conclusions to all our projects. Shadi Chaar, our MD, believes it is as important to be happy in your work as it is to achieve the aims of each project, the goal is to have fun, be the best at what we do while delivering good value to high standards at competitive prices and make money. With years of experience in the industry, our innovation and creative team brings the highest design standards to each project. We continue to design projects that demonstrate our design versatility with an array of styles from classic to modern, and from contemporary to eclectic.
Master-planning is essentially an ethical development process, combined with the vision of social requirements and sustainable environment for residents, public and private facilities. OBE design architects and planning team invite you to participate in this stimulating process to develop customized schemes based on the specific residential and socio-economic aspects in the urban context.

title: OBE
text:
About OBE Architects
In 1997, the ambitious idea of establishing a UAE local homegrown Architectural
Consultancy firm was born, with only one employee for office support, Engineer
Architect OMAR BIN EID started his small office and consultancy license in Dubai,
and began gathering his market data and started to approach prospective clients
himself.
After 20 years of regional market experience, OBE Architects is now an established
local and regional Architectural Firm, with an Unlimited License to handle any size
structures, and full In-House team to handle all Architectural, Structural, MEP, and
Interior Design and Consultancy.
With over 200 completed or in-process projects, OBE Architects’ highly diversified
projects include commercial buildings, industrial buildings, and structures, residential
buildings, hotels, educational, private villas and houses, cultural and religious,
several of which include the financial feasibility study as part of the project.
DIVERSIFIED CAPABILITIES
OBE Architects offers a comprehensive architecture design and consultancy solution,
to give the client peace of mind by providing the multiple solutions through
a One Stop Shop while reducing the risk of miscommunication between different
entities.
With an entirely dedicated team of Architects, Structural Engineers, Civil Engineers,
MEP Engineers, and Interior Designers, plus complete office management
and project management teams, OBE Architects can handle any project, of any
size.
OBE Architects also collaborates with other international firms and different governmental
and non- governmental entities to enrich and strengthen each project,
with a full commitment in design excellence and client service.
FLUID DESIGN www.fluiddesign.ae
As a subsidiary of OBE Architects, providing full-service Interior design and project
management services to high-end hospitality, lounge, commercial and residential
projects. Fluid consistently exceeds client expectations by adapting to ever-changing
design styles while setting standards in quality and creativity. All interior design
works have much of importance in compositional balance using quality materials
with products where detail has a vital role to play in tracing an exquisite interior
arrangement.
Design Philosophy
OBE Architects is highly committed to sustainable building practices and materials. Our philosophy is based upon the communication that leads to highly developed aesthetic and functional designs. The attention to all elements of design has been a constant in the firm’s philosophy.
Our innovation in Project Delivery Initiative is dedicated to advancing the way we work, seeking improved quality in accelerated and integrated project delivery processes. To help keep us at the forefront of innovative design, we believe that it is essential to make focused investments in thought leadership in order to solve our client’s increasingly complex challenges and advance our profession. Our designs advance the goal of a sustainable world: socially, economically and technologically.
